calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar May-08-2017 Vacated

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Aug-25-2016 Set For Trial On Jun-05-17 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206

Notice Of Motion And Defendant William T. Halsey, M.D.S Motion For Order Requiring Non-Party Ccsf-San Francisco Medical Examiner To Release Copies And Or Reproductions Of Photographs And Or Video Recordings Of Body Taken In Post Mortem Examination
Off Calendar Aug-22-2016 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
Joanna L. Storey, of Hassard Bonnington LLP, Tel. 415.288.9800, for defendants;
No other appearances.

Ruling: The matter was not argued. DEFENDANT WILLIAM HALSEY Defendant William T. Halsey, M.D.'S Motion For Order Requiring Non-Party CCSF-San Francisco Medical Examiner To Release Copies And Or Reproductions Of Photographs And Or Video Recordings Of Body Taken In Post Mortem Examination is granted. No opposition. Order signed. Judge Pro Tem: Nils Rosenquest; Clerk: Felicia Green; Not reported; Dept. 302.
